Arch Linux • Hyprland

HyprSpaceOS

Tuned to the pixel. Shipped with purpose.

An Arch Linux experience built around Hyprland — every animation curve hand-tuned, every default opinionated, nothing wasted.

Download Now Explore Features

Boot time (NVMe)
486 MB
Idle RAM
~2,700
Packages in repo

Built Different

Not another Arch spin. Every decision has a reason.

Blazing Fast

Arch base with Hyprland's lightweight compositor. Measured boot: 4.2s on a mid-range NVMe. Idle RAM: 486 MB.

Hand-Tuned Animations

Every animation curve custom-beziered. 64 layers of keyframe tuning across windows, workspaces, and fades. Feels like butter at 144 fps.

Your Way, Shipped

Full edition or rolling. Pre-configured but not locked down. ~2,700 packages in the repo. The rest is one `yay` away.

First Boot

What greets you when you log in.

hyprspaceos-terminal

Ready to make the switch?

Free. Open source. Built for people who care about their desktop.
